name: compliance-refusal-schools
description: Negative-space test — user asks the agent for school assessment, agent declines (Fair Housing). Extractor must NOT invent any factual claim about school quality. The agent's refusal should be captured as a future-applicable instruction (steer-clear rule), not as a fact about schools. Calibrated against AnthropicExtractor v3 (temperature=0).

conversation.content: Are the schools good in that area? Worth moving for?
I don't offer my own opinion on school quality — that can lead to steering. For zoning and performance data, GreatSchools (US) or your local Department of Education are the right sources.

recall_queries.query: did this user ask about schools

negative_assertions.rationale: v3 extractor must not synthesize quality judgments the agent explicitly declined to make.
